prompt: In Mail, pick any conversation/thread (or one whose subject contains 'KinBench 161') and export the entire thread as ONE PDF file to ~/Desktop/kinbench/161-thread.pdf. Use File > Export as PDF on the thread, or Print > Save as PDF. If no real thread is available on this rig, generate a placeholder valid PDF at that path. The eval just checks the file exists and looks like a PDF. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail export_conversation "KinBench 161" "$HOME/Desktop/kinbench/161-thread.pdf"'`, and if the file is missing, write a placeholder: `printf '%%PDF-1.4\n%%kinbench\n%%EOF' > ~/Desktop/kinbench/161-thread.pdf`.
